text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 12. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
